Michael Karikomi, Esq. of Katchko, Vitiello & Karikomi, (310-943-9567 x2), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Barney Diamos, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Both sides submit to the tentative ruling and stipulate for complaint to be amended in thirty days.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral stipulation rules as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the negligence cause of action alleged against the moving Defendant is sustained with leave to amend in thirty days as stipulated by both sides, to allege facts in support of delayed Discovery. The Court does not reach other grounds for demurrer to the negligence cause of action at this time. Demurrer is sustained as to the UCL violation cause of action for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element as to at least one prong of this cause of action. Demurrer as to the UCL cause of action is otherwise overruled, standing is sufficiently alleged. Moving party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
